subcodes.first_line: The Book which the All-Merciful hath sent down from the Kingdom of Utterance unto them that have believed in God, the Lord of the worlds. Should anyone ask thee concerning [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتاب انزله الرحمن من ملکوت البیان لمن آمن بالله رب العالمین لو یسئلک احد عن
subcodes.subjects: @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @wine as symbol of spiritual transformation, @transcending the material condition, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
